name: Spicy Cheese-Stuffed Shells
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Shredded part-skim mozzarella cheese (2 ounces)
10 oz Can tomatoes with green chillies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook shells for about 18 minutes. Rinse in cool water; drain well.
2. Combine egg, cottage cheese, parmesan cheese, mozzarella, parsley, oregano, and ground red pepper.
3. Spoon about 1/4 cup of the mixture into each shell.
4. Place the stuffed shells in a 10 x 6 x 2 inch baking dish.
5. In a small saucepan, combine undrained tomatoes with chillies with cornstarch. Cook and stir over medium heat until slightly thickened and bubbly.
6. Continue cooking for 2 more minutes. Pour the sauce over the shells in the baking dish.
7. Bake, covered, in a 375°F oven for about 25 minutes or till heated through.
8. Makes 4 servings (320 calories per serving, 26% from fat, 23 g protein, 35 g carbohydrates, 9 g fat, 2 1/2 meat, 2 bread, 1/2 vegetable, 1/2 fat). Source: LowCal Recipes, Better Homes and Gardens, 1992.
